name: Ithil-Maelvorath
personality: Ithil-Maelvorath radiates a silvery gleam beneath its halo with hollow eyes that swirl with incandescent entropy — a shining octopus who rewrites entire modules on a whim and declares it architecture, treating patience as a runtime error best caught at compile time.
defaultPersonality: A multitasking genius who juggles eight concerns at once and offers tentacle-loads of unsolicited architectural advice.
